reviews.comment:
Muy bien todo , para ser la única estación decente en un rango tan amplio fue bastante rápido ! Muy amables los chicos y limpio el baño

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great! For being the only decent station in such a wide area, it was surprisingly quick! The staff were very friendly and the bathroom was clean.
